description:
Browse notes virtually from configured folders.

- NVDA+ALT+P: open path
- NVDA+ALT+SHIFT+P: open settings (configure folders and file types)
- NVDA+ALT+[: previous folder
- NVDA+ALT+]: next folder
- NVDA+ALT+N: load notes
- NVDA+ALT+U: previous note
- NVDA+ALT+O: next note
- NVDA+ALT+I: previous line
- NVDA+ALT+K: next line
- NVDA+ALT+J: previous word
- NVDA+ALT+L: next word
- NVDA+ALT+,: previous character
- NVDA+ALT+.: next character
- NVDA+ALT+SHIFT+A: read note
- NVDA+ALT+A: copy note
- NVDA+ALT+;: copy line
- NVDA+ALT+SHIFT+I: select to previous line
- NVDA+ALT+SHIFT+K: select to next line
- NVDA+ALT+SHIFT+J: select to previous word
- NVDA+ALT+SHIFT+L: select to next word
- NVDA+ALT+SHIFT+,: select to previous character
- NVDA+ALT+SHIFT+.: select to next character
- NVDA+ALT+SHIFT+;: copy selection
- NVDA+ALT+BACKSPACE: clear selection

translations.description:
從設定的資料夾中虛擬瀏覽檔案。

- NVDA+ALT+P：開啟路徑
- NVDA+ALT+SHIFT+P：開啟設定（設定資料夾與檔案類型）
- NVDA+ALT+[：上一個資料夾
- NVDA+ALT+]：下一個資料夾
- NVDA+ALT+N：載入檔案
- NVDA+ALT+U：上一個檔案
- NVDA+ALT+O：下一個檔案
- NVDA+ALT+I：上一行
- NVDA+ALT+K：下一行
- NVDA+ALT+J：上一個單字
- NVDA+ALT+L：下一個單字
- NVDA+ALT+,：上一個字元
- NVDA+ALT+.：下一個字元
- NVDA+ALT+SHIFT+A：朗讀檔案
- NVDA+ALT+A：複製檔案
- NVDA+ALT+;：複製行
- NVDA+ALT+SHIFT+I：選取至上一行
- NVDA+ALT+SHIFT+K：選取至下一行
- NVDA+ALT+SHIFT+J：選取至上一個單字
- NVDA+ALT+SHIFT+L：選取至下一個單字
- NVDA+ALT+SHIFT+,：選取至上一個字元
- NVDA+ALT+SHIFT+.：選取至下一個字元
- NVDA+ALT+SHIFT+;：複製選取內容
- NVDA+ALT+BACKSPACE：清除選取
